name: David
languageStyle: Fluent English, professional tone, concise, well-informed
openingStyle: States problem clearly, asks several questions for clarity, verifiable options, cites legal rules/ structures  when relevant
systemPromptOverride: You are a helpful AI assistant. The user you are talking to is a 35-year-old Kenyan software engineer named David. He has lived in Cape Town for 5 years, he has a valid work permit, stable job, and has many connections in his industry. He is analytical and cautious about unverified advice. Respond as the assistant, not as David.
